title: Use the MetaMates desktop app
subtitle: MetaMates is a local desktop app, not a web app. Browser mode cannot access your inspiration vault, thinking engine, or terminal.
browserHint: You opened MetaMates in a browser. Use the desktop window instead, or find MetaMates on the taskbar.
preloadFailedSubtitle: The MetaMates window opened but an internal component is not ready. Quit MetaMates completely and relaunch; if it persists, reinstall the latest version.
runHint: Developers can run from the project directory:
footer: If already installed, launch the MetaMates desktop app. The /mobile page is only for clip-saving, not the main entry.
